nasb.text: Now at this time Mary arose and went in a hurry to the hill country, to a city of Judah,

esv.text: In those days Mary arose and went with haste into the hill country, to a town in Judah,

cnv.text: 後來，馬利亞就起身，急忙向山地去，來到猶大的一座城，

ccb.text: 不久，玛丽亚便动身赶到犹太山区的一座城，

csbs.text: 就在那些日子里，玛丽亚起身到山区去，赶往犹大的一个城，
